title: Orange/White Dark UI Redesign & Domain Settings Frontend

requirements.summary: Redesign the entire frontend UI with a dark background base and a mixed orange & white color theme across all pages
acceptanceCriteria: All pages (Home, Register, Login, Dashboard, Tournaments, Terms, Admin Login, Admin Dashboard) have a dark background.
Orange is used consistently as the primary accent color for buttons, active nav links, step indicators, badges, and highlights.
White or light gray is used for body text, headings, input text, and secondary UI elements.
No white/light backgrounds remain on any page or major component.
The orange/white/dark theme is cohesive and consistent across Player Panel and Admin Panel.
The Raj Empire Esports logo and branding remain intact.

file_operations.description: Update the global Tailwind CSS stylesheet to define dark background tokens and orange/white accent colors. Set --background to a near-black or very dark gray OKLCH value, --primary to vibrant orange, --foreground to white or light gray, and adjust other color tokens (card, popover, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring) to support the dark orange/white theme. Update body background to use the dark background token.

Extend the Tailwind theme to apply the orange/white/dark color palette defined in index.css. Ensure primary, background, foreground, and other semantic color tokens map to the dark orange/white scheme. Verify border radius and font configurations remain intact for the Raj Empire Esports brand.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the HomePage. Update hero section, feature cards, and navigation links to use dark backgrounds, orange buttons/highlights, and white text. Ensure the Raj Empire Esports logo remains visible and social links use the orange accent color.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the RegisterPage. Update the multi-step registration form (mobile → OTP → profile) to use dark card backgrounds, orange step indicators and active states, white form labels/inputs, and orange buttons. Ensure error messages are visible against the dark background.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the LoginPage. Update the two-step login form (mobile number → OTP verification) to use dark card backgrounds, orange step indicators and active states, white form labels/inputs, and orange buttons. Ensure error messages are visible.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the DashboardPage. Update the tabbed sections (tournaments, registrations, profile) to use dark card backgrounds, orange tab highlights and active states, white text, and orange buttons. Ensure the PaymentModal trigger button uses the orange accent color.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the TournamentsPage. Update tournament cards to use dark backgrounds, orange status badges, white text, and orange register buttons. Ensure the PaymentModal uses the dark orange/white theme.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the TermsPage. Update the terms content container to use a dark background, white text, and orange section headings or highlights. Ensure the loading spinner is visible against the dark background.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the AdminLoginPage. Update the admin login form to use a dark card background, white input labels/text, and an orange submit button. Ensure error messages are visible against the dark background.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the AdminDashboardPage. Update all tabbed sections (tournaments, registrations, players, support tickets, terms, social links) to use dark card backgrounds, orange tab highlights and active states, white text, and orange buttons. Ensure table headers, rows, and form inputs use the dark orange/white scheme.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the Header component. Update the sticky navigation bar to use a dark background, orange active nav link highlights, and white text. Ensure the logo remains visible and the mobile hamburger menu uses the dark orange/white theme.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the Footer component. Update the footer to use a dark background, orange social media icons/links, and white text. Ensure the logo and navigation buttons use the dark orange/white scheme.

Apply the dark background and orange/white theme to the PaymentModal component. Update the modal dialog to use a dark background, white text, orange buttons (upload, submit), and dark form inputs. Ensure the terms checkbox and error messages are visible.

Apply the dark background to the Layout component. Ensure the root layout wrapper uses the dark background token and that the Header, Outlet, and Footer are rendered with the dark orange/white theme applied globally.

requirements.summary: Add a 'Domain Settings' section in the Admin Dashboard page to display and update the domain name
acceptanceCriteria: Admin Dashboard has a 'Domain Settings' tab or section.
The current domain name is fetched from the backend and displayed in an editable input field.
The input field is pre-populated with 'Raj-Empire-Esports' by default.
Admin can type a new domain name and click Save to update it via the backend.
A success or error message is shown after saving.
The domain settings section matches the orange/white/dark theme.

file_operations.description: Add two React Query hooks: useGetDomainName (query hook fetching the current domain name via actor.getDomainName) and useSetDomainName (mutation hook updating the domain name via actor.setDomainName). Ensure useSetDomainName invalidates the 'domainName' query key on success to refetch the updated value.

Add a 'Domain Settings' tab to the AdminDashboardPage. Include a section that fetches the current domain name using useGetDomainName and displays it in a controlled text input field. Add a Save button that triggers useSetDomainName with the new domain name value. Show a success toast on successful save and an error message if the mutation fails. Apply the dark orange/white theme to the domain settings section (dark background, white text, orange Save button).
